summary: Sales Module Bug Fixes Testing - Iteration 10. Backend: 10/12 tests passed (2 skipped due to endpoint path). Frontend: Most features working correctly. Found 1 critical frontend bug (TypeError in CRM module when contact.status is null).

minor.issue: Endpoint path is /api/journal-entries, not /api/accounting/journal-entries. Test was skipped but manual verification confirmed journal entries are created correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toLowerCase') - occurs when contact.status is null

action_items: FIX: CRM.tsx line 444 - Add null check for contact.status before calling toLowerCase()
VERIFY: Auto-refresh polling is working (confirmed 2 requests in 25 seconds on CRM module)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/invoices/:id/convert-to-invoice creates invoice with status='Paid'
VERIFIED: After conversion, source quote keeps original status (Accepted/Signed), NOT changed to 'Converted'
VERIFIED: After conversion, source quote has convertedToInvoiceId filled
VERIFIED: New invoice (Paid) triggers OHADA journal entry with sourceRef = invoice.id
VERIFIED: Journal entries endpoint is /api/journal-entries (found 2 entries with correct sourceRef)
VERIFIED: Duplicate conversion blocked with 409 Conflict
VERIFIED: Users & Roles module CRUD operations working (list users, list roles, create role, create user)
VERIFIED: Quote with status='Sent' displays 'En attente' badge (not 'Envoyé')
VERIFIED: Signed quotes visible in 'Devis Signés / Réception' tab (found 2 quotes)
VERIFIED: DGID certification banner shows neutral message 'Facture non certifiée — cliquez Certifier maintenant' (no confusing 'réservé aux sociétés démo' text)
VERIFIED: Auto-refresh polling working (10s interval confirmed via network monitoring)
VERIFIED: RDC invoices have null certificationNumber (expected - DGID only for Congo CG)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (1 critical bug found in CRM module)

seed_data_creation: Created test quotes and contacts during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales module conversion flow working correctly. Quote-to-invoice creates Paid invoice, journal entry auto-created, quote keeps original status. DGID certification banner message is correct. Auto-refresh polling confirmed working at 10s intervals. CRM module has a null pointer bug on contact.status that needs fixing.

quote_to_invoice_conversion.details: Invoice created with status='Paid', quote keeps original status, convertedToInvoiceId filled

journal_entry_automation.details: Journal entries auto-created with sourceRef = invoice.id (verified 2 entries)

dgid_certification_banner.details: Shows neutral message without confusing 'réservé aux sociétés démo' text

quote_sent_status_display.details: Quote with status='Sent' shows 'En attente' badge

signed_quotes_reception_tab.details: Signed/Accepted quotes visible in reception tab with CONVERTI badges

users_roles_module.details: List users, list roles, create role, create user all working

bugs_found.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toLowerCase')
bugs_found.cause: contact.status can be null, but code calls .toLowerCase() without null check
bugs_found.reproduction: Navigate to CRM module, wait for auto-refresh, if any contact has null status the app crashes
